summary: Phase G Watermark System testing completed successfully. All watermark features implemented and working correctly. Backend API returns watermark field, Profile page has watermark toggle (ON by default with Pro badge), and Self Tape Review page displays watermark overlay.
critical_code_review_comments: Watermark component correctly implemented with 60% opacity white text and shadow
Watermark toggle uses AsyncStorage for persistence across sessions
Casting share API correctly returns watermark text in response
Voice Studio shows watermark text on reel cards (visible when reels exist)
Pro badge shown next to watermark toggle - indicates future Pro removal feature
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase G Watermark System fully tested. All features working: 1) Profile page at /profile shows watermark toggle at bottom with 'ScriptM8 Watermark' label, description, switch (ON by default), and 'Pro' badge. 2) Casting share API GET /api/tapes/share/{share_id} returns 'watermark' field with text 'Recorded with ScriptM8 · AI Training Studio for Actors'. 3) Self tape review page at /selftape/review renders Watermark component overlay showing 'Recorded with ScriptM8' and 'AI Training Studio for Actors'. 4) Voice studio at /voice-studio has watermark text on reel cards (shown when reels exist). 5) Home page loads correctly with all sections. 6) Auditions page loads correctly. 7) API health check returns healthy status.

tests_performed.test: Casting share API GET /api/tapes/share/92c6929d returns watermark field
Watermark text is 'Recorded with ScriptM8 · AI Training Studio for Actors'
Home page at / loads with Train/Rehearse/Record/Career sections
Profile page at /profile shows watermark toggle section
Profile page has description text about exported self tapes/demo reels/casting share pages
Profile page has switch toggle ON by default
Profile page has 'Pro' badge next to toggle
Auditions page at /auditions loads with dashboard and filters
Voice studio at /voice-studio loads with Record/Takes/Reels tabs
Self tape review at /selftape/review shows Watermark overlay
Watermark overlay shows 'Recorded with ScriptM8' text
Watermark overlay shows 'AI Training Studio for Actors' text
